_comment: issue #60 M4 traces differential corpus + coverage matrix (e2e/src/traces_corpus.rs + e2e/src/traces.rs). `{R}` in every case's `q` is replaced with this run's run_id at execution time; every case conjoins `resource.run_id = "{R}"` so a stale stack can never leak foreign traces into a set-equality comparison. Gate discipline (plan v2 deltas 2+3): every committed M4 TraceQL construct whose expected trace-ID set is corpus-computable is listed, and every case starts `mode: "gated"` — the exclusion list starts EMPTY. A case moves to `mode: "informational"` only via the #33 triage discipline: an observed live divergence, triaged fix-our-bug vs ratify-documented-difference, recorded in docs/benchmarks/traces-differential-ledger.md (the `ledger` field names the entry). `limit` is the search request cap on both stores; every case's expected set is sized below it (validity gates: our metrics.partial == false, Tempo result_count < limit).

cases.construct: resource.service.name equality (promoted service column, service_time projection generator)
resource.service.name equality matched via a non-root resource (multi-resource trace)
resource.service.name =~ (full-value anchored regex, indexed attr generator)
span-scoped attr numeric >= (val_num key-only scan)
span-scoped attr numeric =
span-scoped attr bool =
span-scoped attr float >
resource-scoped attr string =
unscoped attr (.key resolves both scopes)
attr =~ (positive regex never matches a missing key)
attr != where every span carries the key (no missing-key dependence)
attr !~ where every span carries the key
attr != where some spans lack the key entirely (docs/api.md §4.2 matches-missing rule)
name intrinsic =
status intrinsic (non-indexed physical column path)
kind intrinsic (non-indexed physical column path)
duration intrinsic >
same-span && conjunction across service, numeric attr, and status (the worked-example shape)
{A} || {B} trace-level union
cases.q: { resource.run_id = "{R}" && status = error } || { resource.run_id = "{R}" && kind = consumer }

cases.construct: {A} && {B} cross-spanset intersection satisfied by different spans (same-span conjunction would be empty)
pipeline aggregate count() over the matched span set
pipeline aggregate avg(duration) over the matched span set
select() projection (never changes the matched trace set)
nested (a || b) && (c || d) boolean tree, same-span semantics

informational._comment: Never-gating comparisons (ratified on #19/#60): tags-vs-Tempo runs parameterlessly against both tag surfaces; each metrics query below runs against both stores' TraceQL-metrics query_range endpoints. Deltas are dumped to target/e2e-artifacts/traces-diff/<variant>/informational-*.json and the scenario returns Ok regardless.
